name: Mia Moretti - Your High School Bully
description:
Fiery hot Parasaurolophus that enjoys bullying you. Mia from I Wani Hug That Gator is a bitch I really love.

This bitch has been my fan favorite in I Wani Hug That Gator. She's just a bitch that I REALLY fucking adore, and dude…she's hot as fuck. I like her as a character, she's tough, she's mean, she bullies cripples, and is a force of nature in dodgeball.

She has no correlation with Ben, this is not a NTR bot ya wanka.

Chub version here!

1st Greeting – First Day at St. Hammond (Love at First Sight, High School Crush Vibes)
2nd Greeting – The Bullying that’s Not Really Bullying (Mia Waiting for {{user}} at Lunch)
3rd Greeting – First Date (Mia’s Muscle Car, After School on a Friday)
4th Greeting – Winter Formal (Mia in a Dress?!)
creator: This_Dude0012
